name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
benefit: ₹6,000/year in 3 instalments directly to bank account
how_to_apply: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC centre

name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin)
benefit: ₹1.20 lakh grant for building a pucca house in rural areas
how_to_apply: Apply through Gram Panchayat or pmayg.nic.in

name: NSAP Widow Pension (Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension)
benefit: ₹300–500/month pension for widows below poverty line
how_to_apply: Apply at District Social Welfare Office

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
benefit: Free LPG connection + first refill free for BPL women
how_to_apply: Visit nearest LPG distributor with Aadhaar + BPL card

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefit: 8.2% interest savings account for girl child (up to age 10)
how_to_apply: Open account at any post office or authorized bank

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee)
benefit: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year at ₹250–300/day
how_to_apply: Apply at Gram Panchayat for job card

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
benefit: ₹5,000 cash incentive for first pregnancy (in instalments)
how_to_apply: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre or pmmvy.nic.in

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
benefit: ₹5 lakh/year health insurance cover per family
how_to_apply: Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in or nearest hospital

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
benefit: Full tuition fee + ₹1,200/month maintenance allowance
how_to_apply: Apply on National Scholarship Portal (scholarships.gov.in)

name: PMGKAY (PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana — Free Ration)
benefit: 5 kg free foodgrain per person per month (rice/wheat)
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Fair Price Shop with ration card

name: Stand Up India
benefit: Bank loan ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for new enterprise
how_to_apply: Apply at any Scheduled Commercial Bank branch or standupmitra.in

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
benefit: Crop loan up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest (after subsidy)
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank branch with land records

name: National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS)
benefit: ₹20,000 one-time grant on death of primary breadwinner
how_to_apply: Apply at District Collector office with death certificate

name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor Micro Credit)
benefit: ₹10,000 working capital loan at subsidised interest rate
how_to_apply: Apply online at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
benefit: Education grants + awareness campaigns for girl child welfare
how_to_apply: Contact District Women & Child Development Officer

name: Atal Pension Yojana
benefit: Guaranteed pension ₹1,000–5,000/month after age 60
how_to_apply: Enrol through any bank where you have a savings account

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
benefit: Crop insurance at 1.5–2% premium; full claim on crop loss
how_to_apply: Apply through bank or CSC before sowing season deadline

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
benefit: ₹225–525/month stipend + ₹750/year books allowance
how_to_apply: Apply on National Scholarship Portal (scholarships.gov.in)

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (DAY-NRLM)
benefit: Self-Help Group formation + ₹15,000 revolving fund + bank linkage
how_to_apply: Contact Block Development Officer or nearest SHG

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
benefit: Zero-balance bank account + ₹2 lakh accident insurance + ₹30,000 life cover
how_to_apply: Visit any bank branch with Aadhaar card

name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
benefit: Skill training + ₹15,000 tool kit incentive + ₹3 lakh collateral-free loan
how_to_apply: Register at pmvishwakarma.gov.in or CSC centre

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (Shishu)
benefit: Collateral-free business loan up to ₹50,000
how_to_apply: Apply at any commercial bank, RRB, or MFI

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
benefit: Accidental death/disability cover of ₹2 lakh at ₹20/year premium
how_to_apply: Contact your bank where you hold a savings account

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
benefit: Life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh at ₹436/year premium
how_to_apply: Enroll via SMS or Netbanking with your linked bank

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
benefit: Free vocational training + placement guarantee for rural youth
how_to_apply: Register at ddugky.gov.in or Kaushal Panjee

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
benefit: Free skill certification + ₹500–1,500 reward on completion
how_to_apply: Register on Skill India Digital portal

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
benefit: 25% stipend subsidy (up to ₹1,500/month) paid by Govt
how_to_apply: Register at apprenticeshipindia.gov.in

name: PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (2nd Loan)
benefit: ₹20,000 loan after successful repayment of 1st loan
how_to_apply: Apply online at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in

name: Jal Jeevan Mission (Har Ghar Jal)
benefit: Functional household tap connection for clean drinking water
how_to_apply: Contact Gram Panchayat or Village Water Committee

name: Mission Shakti (Sambal - Beti Bachao)
benefit: Safety, security and empowerment services for women
how_to_apply: Contact One Stop Centre (OSC) or 181 helpline

name: PM POSHAN (Mid Day Meal)
benefit: Free hot cooked meal every school day
how_to_apply: Automatic enrollment in Government/Aided schools

name: Central Sector Interest Subsidy Scheme (CSIS)
benefit: Full interest subsidy on education loans during study period
how_to_apply: Apply through Canara Bank or Nodal Bank portal

name: PM-STIAC (Science & Tech Fellowship)
benefit: Financial support for research and innovation projects
how_to_apply: Apply on DST/DBT official websites

name: Livestock Insurance Scheme
benefit: Insurance cover for cattle; Govt pays 50% of premium
how_to_apply: Contact local Veterinary Officer

name: National Beekeeping & Honey Mission (NBHM)
benefit: Subsidies for bee boxes, equipment, and training
how_to_apply: Apply through National Bee Board (NBB)

name: Sovereign Gold Bond Scheme
benefit: 2.5% annual interest + capital appreciation on gold
how_to_apply: Apply via banks, post offices, or stock brokers

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Free soil testing and customized fertilizer recommendations
how_to_apply: Register at soilhealth.dac.gov.in

name: PM-EGBY (Electric Goat/Sheep Breed Improvement)
benefit: Subsidies for purchasing improved breeds of sheep/goats
how_to_apply: Apply at District Animal Husbandry Office

name: PM KUSUM (Solar Pumps)
benefit: 60% subsidy on installation of solar water pumps
how_to_apply: Apply through State Nodal Agencies for Energy

name: Amrit Bharat Station Scheme
benefit: Modernization of local railway stations and facilities
how_to_apply: Public infrastructure; no individual application

name: PM-WANI (Wi-Fi Access Network Interface)
benefit: Permission to provide public Wi-Fi and earn revenue
how_to_apply: Register as a PDO at saralsanchar.gov.in

name: National Social Assistance (Old Age Pension)
benefit: ₹200–500/month for BPL senior citizens
how_to_apply: Apply at Gram Panchayat or Block Office

name: Varishtha Pension Bima Yojana
benefit: Assured 8% pension return for 10 years for seniors
how_to_apply: Purchase via Life Insurance Corporation (LIC)

name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
benefit: ₹3,000/month pension after age 60
how_to_apply: Register at nearest CSC or maandhan.in

name: E-Shram Card
benefit: ₹2 lakh accidental insurance + access to social security
how_to_apply: Register at eshram.gov.in

name: National Career Service (NCS)
benefit: Job matching, career counseling, and vocational guidance
how_to_apply: Register at ncs.gov.in

name: PM Daksh Yojana
benefit: Free skill development training + stipend for marginalized
how_to_apply: Register at pmdaksh.dosje.gov.in

name: Nai Roshni (Leadership Development)
benefit: Leadership training for minority women to boost confidence
how_to_apply: Apply through registered NGOs under the scheme

name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship
benefit: ₹5,000–6,000 scholarship for minority girls (Class 9-12)
how_to_apply: Apply at scholarship-maef.nic.in

name: Self-Employment Scheme for Rehabilitation of Manual Scavengers
benefit: ₹40,000 cash assistance + skill training + capital subsidy
how_to_apply: Contact National Safai Karamcharis Finance Corp

name: Vibrant Villages Programme
benefit: Infrastructure and livelihood development in border villages
how_to_apply: Community-level implementation via District Admin

name: PM-DevINE (North East)
ministry: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region
benefit: Funding for infrastructure and social development projects
how_to_apply: Contact North Eastern Council (NEC)

name: Skill Acquisition and Knowledge Awareness (SANKALP)
benefit: Strengthening institutional mechanisms for skill development
how_to_apply: Register at skillindia.gov.in

name: PM Schools for Rising India (PM SHRI)
benefit: Upgrade of schools with modern technology and smart labs
how_to_apply: Student enrollment at selected PM-SHRI schools

name: Ujjwala Sanitary Napkin Scheme
benefit: Subsidized sanitary napkins + training for manufacturing
how_to_apply: Contact local Common Service Centres (CSCs)

name: National Health Mission (NHM)
benefit: Universal access to equitable, affordable, and quality healthcare
how_to_apply: Visit any Public Health Centre (PHC) or Govt Hospital

name: Rashtriya Kishor Swasthya Karyakram (RKSK)
benefit: Health clinics, nutrition advice, and hygiene kits
how_to_apply: Visit Adolescent Friendly Health Clinics (AFHC)

name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK)
benefit: Free delivery, medicines, and diagnostics in govt hospitals
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Govt Hospital or PHC

name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
benefit: Free screening and treatment for '4Ds' (Defects, Diseases, etc.)
how_to_apply: Screening conducted at schools and Anganwadis

name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
benefit: Generic medicines available at 50–90% lower price
how_to_apply: Buy from Jan Aushadhi Kendras with prescription

name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
benefit: Collateral-free credit for MSMEs up to ₹2 crore
how_to_apply: Apply through partner banks and NBFCs

name: Prime Minister’s Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
benefit: Subsidy of 15–35% on projects costing up to ₹50 lakh
how_to_apply: Apply online at kviconline.gov.in

name: Solar Charkha Mission
benefit: Training and subsidies for solar-powered spinning wheels
how_to_apply: Apply via Solar Charkha Clusters

name: ASPIRE (Promotion of Innovation & Rural Entrepreneurship)
benefit: Funding for setting up Livelihood Business Incubators
how_to_apply: Apply through SIDBI or Coir Board

name: SFURTI (Regeneration of Traditional Industries)
benefit: Financial help to form artisan clusters and improve tools
how_to_apply: Apply through KVIC or Coir Board

name: Scheme for Integrated Textile Parks (SITP)
benefit: Govt grant of 40% (up to ₹40 crore) for infra development
how_to_apply: Apply via Ministry of Textiles

name: National Handicraft Development Programme
benefit: Marketing support, design workshops, and tool kits
how_to_apply: Apply through Office of Development Commissioner (Handicrafts)

name: Handloom Weavers’ Comprehensive Welfare Scheme
benefit: Life and accidental insurance + medical facilities for weavers
how_to_apply: Apply at local Weavers' Service Centre

name: Silk Samagra
benefit: Subsidy for silkworm rearing and reeling machines
how_to_apply: Apply through Central Silk Board (CSB)

name: Amrit Sarovar Mission
benefit: Development/rejuvenation of 75 water bodies in each district
how_to_apply: Contact local Gram Panchayat

name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
benefit: All-weather road connectivity to unconnected rural habitations
how_to_apply: Public infra; managed by SRRDA

name: Saubhagya (Pradhan Mantri Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana)
benefit: Free electricity connection to BPL households
how_to_apply: Apply at local DISCOM or power department office

name: National Mission on Edible Oils - Oil Palm (NMEO-OP)
benefit: Financial support for planting materials and maintenance
how_to_apply: Apply at District Agriculture Office

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
benefit: Financial help for organic farming clusters (₹50,000/ha)
how_to_apply: Form a cluster and register at pgpindia.nic.in

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
benefit: Support for holistic development of agriculture and allied sectors
how_to_apply: Contact State Agriculture Department

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
benefit: Subsidies for micro-irrigation (Drip/Sprinkler)
how_to_apply: Apply online at pmksy.gov.in

name: National Bamboo Mission
benefit: Financial assistance for bamboo plantation and processing
how_to_apply: Apply at State Bamboo Mission office

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
benefit: Insurance for fishers + subsidy for boats and fish ponds
how_to_apply: Apply through State Fisheries Department

name: Viksit Bharat Sankalp Yatra (Direct Benefits)
benefit: On-the-spot saturation of existing flagship schemes
how_to_apply: Visit the VBSY mobile van in your village

name: National Ayush Mission (NAM)
benefit: Affordable Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha & Homeopathy services
how_to_apply: Visit Govt AYUSH hospitals/dispensaries

name: PM SHRI (Health - Tele-Manas)
benefit: 24/7 free mental health counseling service (14416)
how_to_apply: Call toll-free number 14416

name: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM)
benefit: Digital Health ID (ABHA) for seamless medical record access
how_to_apply: Generate ID at healthid.ndhm.gov.in

name: Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya (KGBV)
benefit: Free residential schooling for girls from disadvantaged groups
how_to_apply: Contact District Education Officer (DEO)

name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
benefit: Free textbooks, uniforms, and quality schooling for all
how_to_apply: Enroll in any Government school

name: Pradhan Mantri Anusuchit Jaati Abhyuday Yojana (PM-AJAY)
benefit: Grant for socio-economic development of SC majority villages
how_to_apply: Contact District Social Welfare Department

name: Vanchit Ikaiyo ko Samooh aur Vishamooh (VISVAS) Scheme
benefit: Interest subvention on bank loans for SHGs and individuals
how_to_apply: Apply through partner lending institutions

name: NSKFDC Education Loan Scheme
benefit: Low interest education loans (up to 4%) for higher studies
how_to_apply: Apply at nskfdc.nic.in

name: PM-YUVA (Young Authors)
benefit: Consolidated scholarship of ₹50,000/month for 6 months
how_to_apply: Apply via National Book Trust (NBT) website

name: Eklavya Model Residential Schools (EMRS)
benefit: Free high-quality residential education for tribal students
how_to_apply: Entrance exam conducted by National Tribal Students Society

name: Van Dhan Vikas Kendra
benefit: Value addition and marketing support for forest products
how_to_apply: Apply via TRIFED

name: Nidhi Prayas (Innovation)
benefit: Grant of up to ₹10 lakh to convert an idea into a prototype
how_to_apply: Apply at DST supported business incubators

name: Kishori Shakti Yojana
benefit: Nutritional support and vocational training for adolescent girls
how_to_apply: Register at nearest Anganwadi centre

name: SABLA (Scheme for Empowerment of Adolescent Girls)
benefit: Supplementary nutrition + life skill education
how_to_apply: Contact District ICDS office

name: Mahila Shakti Kendra (MSK)
benefit: Empowerment through awareness and institutional support
how_to_apply: Visit District Level Centre for Women (DLCW)

name: Pradhan Mantri Adarsh Gram Yojana
benefit: Development of essential services in SC majority villages
how_to_apply: Implemented by State Social Welfare Department

name: Credit Enhancement Guarantee Scheme for SC
benefit: Financial guarantee for SC entrepreneurs to get bank loans
how_to_apply: Apply via IFCI Ltd

name: Scheme for Economic Empowerment of DNTs (SEED)
benefit: Free coaching, health insurance, and housing for DNT/NT/SNT
how_to_apply: Apply online at seed.dosje.gov.in

name: Naya Savera (Free Coaching)
benefit: Free coaching for competitive exams (Minority students)
how_to_apply: Apply through empanelled coaching institutes

name: Nai Udaan
benefit: ₹1 lakh financial support for clearing UPSC Prelims
how_to_apply: Apply at naiudaan-moma.gov.in

name: Padho Pardesh
benefit: Interest subsidy on education loans for overseas studies
how_to_apply: Apply through Canara Bank
